pages.text: 咘咘有一个小习惯。每次紧张的时候，她就会咬嘴唇。咬得紧紧的，小嘴巴都红了。
pages.text_en: Bubu had a little habit—whenever she felt nervous, she bit her lips tightly until they turned red.

pages.text: 怕打雷的时候，咬嘴唇。怕黑的时候，咬嘴唇。不认识的叔叔阿姨来了，也咬嘴唇。
pages.text_en: When it thundered, she bit her lips. When she was scared of the dark, she bit her lips. Even when strangers came around, she bit them too.

pages.text: 今天，森林里要办一个小小音乐会。NOMI 说："咘咘，你来唱一首歌好不好？"
pages.text_en: Today, the forest was holding a little music concert. NOMI said: "Bubu, will you sing a song?"

pages.text: 咘咘一听就紧张了，马上咬住嘴唇。"不要不要！好多人看着我，我害怕！"
pages.text_en: As soon as Bubu heard, she got nervous and bit her lips again. "No, no! So many people will be watching. I’m scared!"

pages.text: NOMI 蹲下来，轻轻握住咘咘的手："没关系，害怕是正常的。NOMI 教你一个魔法好不好？"
pages.text_en: NOMI crouched down, gently holding Bubu’s hand: "It’s okay to be scared. How about I teach you a little magic?"

pages.text: "深深吸一口气——像闻一朵花一样。"咘咘吸了一口气。"再慢慢吐出来——像吹一个泡泡一样。"
pages.text_en: "Take a deep breath—like you’re smelling a flower." Bubu inhaled deeply. "Now exhale slowly—like you’re blowing a bubble."

pages.text: 吸——吐——吸——吐——咘咘做了三次。奇怪，心跳好像没那么快了，嘴唇也不想咬了。
pages.text_en: Inhale—exhale—inhale—exhale—Bubu did it three times. Oddly enough, her heart didn’t race as much, and she didn’t want to bite her lips anymore.

pages.text: Sam 爸爸走过来说："咘咘，你知道吗？爸爸小时候也会害怕。上台的时候腿都在发抖呢。"
pages.text_en: Daddy Sam came over and said: "Bubu, did you know that when I was young, I got scared too? My legs shook when I went on stage."

pages.text: "真的吗？爸爸也会害怕？"咘咘睁大了眼睛。"当然啦。每个人都会害怕，害怕不丢人。"
pages.text_en: "Really? Daddy gets scared too?" Bubu’s eyes widened. "Of course! Everyone feels scared. It's nothing to be ashamed of."

pages.text: Tina 妈妈也来了："妈妈第一次做蛋糕的时候，手都在抖。但是慢慢做，一步一步来，最后做出了一个好大的蛋糕！"
pages.text_en: Mommy Tina came and said: "The first time I baked a cake, my hands were shaking. But I did it slowly, step by step, and in the end, I made a big cake!"

pages.text: "慢慢来？"咘咘小声说。"对呀，不用急，慢慢来就好。"妈妈亲了亲咘咘的额头。
pages.text_en: "Take it slow?" Bubu whispered. "Yes, no rush, just take your time." Mommy kissed Bubu’s forehead.

pages.text: 音乐会开始了。豆豆先上台，用树叶吹了一首曲子。小刺猬吹完以后，开心地跑下来："一点也不可怕！"
pages.text_en: The concert began. Doudou went on stage first and played a tune using leaves. After he finished, he happily ran off the stage: "That wasn’t scary at all!"

pages.text: 慢慢也上台了，唱了一首很慢很慢的歌。大家都笑了，因为慢慢什么都慢慢的，但是很可爱。
pages.text_en: Manman went on stage too and sang a very slow song. Everyone laughed because everything Manman did was so slow but very cute.

pages.text: 轮到咘咘了。咘咘站在台下，小手又开始抖了。她又想咬嘴唇了。
pages.text_en: Then it was Bubu’s turn. She stood below the stage, her little hands trembling again. She wanted to bite her lips.

pages.text: NOMI 在旁边小声说："记得魔法吗？闻花花，吹泡泡。"咘咘深深吸了一口气，慢慢吐出来。好了，没那么怕了。
pages.text_en: NOMI whispered from the side: "Remember the magic? Smell the flower, blow the bubble." Bubu took a deep breath and exhaled slowly. She felt much less afraid.

pages.text: 咘咘慢慢走上台，慢慢张开嘴巴，唱了一首小星星。声音小小的，但是很好听。
pages.text_en: Bubu slowly walked onto the stage and opened her mouth. She sang "Twinkle Twinkle Little Star." Her voice was soft but very sweet.

pages.text: 唱完了，大家都鼓掌了。咘咘笑了——原来，慢慢来，就不那么害怕了。下次再紧张的时候，记得：闻花花，吹泡泡，慢慢来。
pages.text_en: When she finished, everyone clapped. Bubu smiled—taking it slow really did help her feel braver. Next time she felt nervous, she’d remember: Smell the flower, blow the bubble, take it slow.
